2026-04-23T08:16:30.2979418Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-23T08:16:30.2979834Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-23T08:16:30.2980190Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-23T08:16:30.2980479Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-23T08:16:30.2980710Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-23T08:16:30.2980870Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m

2026-04-23T08:16:30.2981462Z [36;1m{[0m

2026-04-23T08:16:30.2981916Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-23T08:16:30.2982163Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m
